title: Tögal – from the Ying Rig Tö – Treasury of the Space of Awareness
teacher: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Geshe Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche
description_raw: Three-day seminar on Tögal practice from the Ying Rig Tö text, taught by Menri Shedrup Khenpo Geshe Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche. Tögal is described as the highest practice in Sutra, Tantra, and Dzogchen, leading to the great transformation of the rainbow body.
ai_summary: A three-day seminar on advanced Tögal meditation practice from the Bön tradition, taught by a senior teacher.

title: Keksel Teaching Course - Part II
description_raw: Keksel Teaching Course - Part II with Chaphur Rinpoche in Poland, September 3-4, 2026. Keksel is a system of body, breath and energy work combining tantra and dzogchen elements.
ai_summary: A two-day teaching course on Keksel practice (body, breath, and energy work) led by Chaphur Rinpoche, combining tantric and dzogchen methods for spiritual and physical wellbeing.

title: Takla Mebar Teachings and Initiation
description_raw: Teachings and initiation of Takla Mebar, a healing practice of the Yungdrung Bon tradition led by Chaphur Rinpoche in Poland, September 5-6, 2026. Takla Mebar (Burning Tiger Deity) is a method for clearing obstacles and transforming difficult emotions.
ai_summary: A two-day intensive on Takla Mebar, a Yungdrung Bön healing practice for clearing obstacles and transforming emotions, led by Chaphur Rinpoche in an accessible and practical format.

title: Mudras in Mother Tantra
platform_detail: In-person at Wilga, Poland + online option
description_raw: A meditation course on Mother Tantra with Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche, principal teacher at Tibetan Menri Monastery. Teachings on Mother Tantra meditations and mudras (hand positions), conducted in English with Polish translation. Open to beginners.
ai_summary: A three-day hybrid meditation course on Mother Tantra teachings and mudras with an accomplished Bön teacher, available both in-person in Poland and online.

title: Pharping Retreat with Drupön Lama Karma Rinpoche
description_raw: 10-day retreat in Pharping with daily teachings, meditation practice, group practice and Q&A. Includes Tertön Pegyal Lingpa's Seven-Line Prayer Empowerment.
ai_summary: A 10-day in-person retreat in Nepal with teachings, meditation, and a rare empowerment from Drupön Lama Karma Rinpoche.

title: Maratika Amitayus Retreat with Yarinak Pilgrimage
description_raw: Pilgrimage and practice in Yarinak, followed by an Amitayus retreat in Maratika with teachings and practice on Amitayus from Tertön Pegyal Lingpa's tradition. Includes empowerment.
ai_summary: A pilgrimage and 13-day in-person Amitayus retreat in Nepal with teachings and a rare empowerment from Drupön Lama Karma Rinpoche.

title: Muktinath (Chumig Gyatsa) Pilgrimage
description_raw: A pilgrimage to Chumig Gyatsa (Muktinath), one of the most sacred sites connected with Guru Rinpoche.
ai_summary: A 7-day in-person pilgrimage to a sacred Guru Rinpoche site in Nepal led by Drupön Lama Karma Rinpoche.

title: Exploring the Body of Light: Online Teachings on the Subtle Body
start_local_text: Sat. July 25, 2026, 10:00 am - 2:00 pm Central-Chicago Time
description_raw: Khandro Kunzang gives an in-depth teaching on the subtle energy body according to Vajrayana Buddhist yogic teachings, covering channels, winds, perception, and the effects of sound and mantras on the subtle body.
ai_summary: A two-day online course on Buddhist tantra's teachings about the subtle body, energy channels, and winds, taught by Khandro Kunzang for students interested in Vajrayana practices.

title: Exploring the Body of Light: Online Teachings on the Subtle Body
start_local_text: Sun. July 26, 2026, 10:00 am - 2:00 pm Central-Chicago Time
description_raw: Khandro Kunzang gives an in-depth teaching on the subtle energy body according to Vajrayana Buddhist yogic teachings, covering channels, winds, perception, and the effects of sound and mantras on the subtle body.
ai_summary: A two-day online course on Buddhist tantra's teachings about the subtle body, energy channels, and winds, taught by Khandro Kunzang for students interested in Vajrayana practices.

title: Lung Jong Pranayama with Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche
description_raw: Lung Jong Pranayama practice combining movements, breathing, stretching, and meditation from Indian and Tibetan Nam Chö yoga traditions. Teaching occurs once a month on Sundays via Zoom with English and Russian simultaneous translation.
ai_summary: A monthly online yoga and meditation class combining Tibetan and Indian breathing practices, taught by Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche on Zoom in English and Russian, open to all levels.

title: Lung Jong Pranayama with Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche
description_raw: Lung Jong Pranayama practice combining movements, breathing, stretching, and meditation from Indian and Tibetan Nam Chö yoga traditions. Teaching occurs once a month on Sundays via Zoom with English and Russian simultaneous translation.
ai_summary: A monthly online yoga and meditation class combining Tibetan and Indian breathing practices, taught by Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche on Zoom in English and Russian, open to all levels.

title: Lung Jong Pranayama with Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche
description_raw: Lung Jong Pranayama practice combining movements, breathing, stretching, and meditation from Indian and Tibetan Nam Chö yoga traditions. Teaching occurs once a month on Sundays via Zoom with English and Russian simultaneous translation.
ai_summary: A monthly online yoga and meditation class combining Tibetan and Indian breathing practices, taught by Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche on Zoom in English and Russian, open to all levels.

title: Natural Freedom Upon Hearing Teachings on the Bardos Part 2
description_raw: Gochen Tulku Sang-ngag Rinpoche teaching on the Bardos, Part 2, translated by Vanessa Kubota. Teaching sessions from 10:00-12:00 and 2:00-4:00 PDT on Zoom.
ai_summary: A two-session Tibetan Buddhist teaching by Gochen Tulku Sang-ngag Rinpoche on the bardos (intermediate states after death), Part 2 of a series, open to new attendees.

title: Kalachakra Retreat
description_raw: Drikung Dzogchen Community of Vermont: Kalachakra Retreat August 1-3. Join us August 1-3 for a rare and profound retreat on Mahamudra and Nature of Mind.
ai_summary: A three-day Tibetan Buddhist retreat on Kalachakra, Mahamudra, and Nature of Mind hosted by the Drikung Dzogchen Community of Vermont.

title: Savour the Nikayas – SN (Part 3)
description_raw: Sis Sylvia Bay teaches the Samyutta Nikaya with clarity and characteristic cheerful humour, as part 3 of this ongoing series.
ai_summary: A dharma teaching on the Samyutta Nikaya (one of Buddhism's foundational texts) taught with clarity and humour by Sis Sylvia Bay.

title: Meditation Sunday
description_raw: Bro Beng Hock guides participants through stillness, calm, and the joy of a settled mind in a full morning meditation session.
ai_summary: A guided meditation practice focused on breathwork and mental stillness, led by Bro Tan Beng Hock.

title: What is to be Abandoned, and How?
description_raw: Bhante Seelananda, born in Sri Lanka and currently based in the US, teaches on abandonment practices as the first of four power-packed sessions.
ai_summary: A dharma teaching on Buddhist practices of abandonment and non-clinging, taught by visiting Sri Lankan monk Bhante Seelananda.

title: Teachings on Heart Sutra
platform_detail: Rangjung Yeshe Gomde Pyrénées (in-person and online)
description_raw: Teachings by Kyabjé Khen Rinpoche Tashi Palden on Heart Sutra, hosted by Rangjung Yeshe Gomde Pyrénées onsite and online, 25th July to 3rd August 2026 at 11am CET.
ai_summary: A multi-day teaching on the Heart Sutra by Kyabjé Khen Rinpoche Tashi Palden, available both in-person in the French Pyrenees and online.

title: Kalachakra initiation and Three Principal Aspects of the Path teachings
description_raw: Kalachakra initiation with teachings on the Three Principal Aspects of the Path and Lojong (mind training), part of His Eminence Jhado Rinpoche's five-day UK teaching visit in September.
ai_summary: A two-day Kalachakra initiation and teachings on the Three Principal Aspects of the Path and mind training, led by His Eminence Jhado Rinpoche.

title: Cittamani Tara initiation and oral transmission
description_raw: Cittamani Tara initiation and oral transmission, as part of His Eminence Jhado Rinpoche's five-day UK teaching visit.
ai_summary: A one-day Cittamani Tara initiation and oral transmission session led by His Eminence Jhado Rinpoche.

title: Lama Tsongkhapa and Medicine Buddha teachings with Guru Puja commentary
description_raw: Lama Tsongkhapa and Medicine Buddha jenangs with commentary on the Lama Chöpa (Guru Puja), completing His Eminence Jhado Rinpoche's five-day teaching visit.
ai_summary: A two-day session featuring Lama Tsongkhapa and Medicine Buddha teachings with Guru Puja commentary, led by His Eminence Jhado Rinpoche.

title: 2026 Summer Dzogchen Retreat
start_local_text: July 18-25, 2026; teachings at Padma Samye Ling in upstate NY
description_raw: 2026 Summer Dzogchen Retreat with Ven. Khenpo Tsewang Dongyal Rinpoche at Padma Samye Ling (July 18-25). In person and live webcast; Dzogchen teachings and empowerment of Vajrakilaya according to the lineage of Tsasum Lingpa.
ai_summary: A week-long Dzogchen retreat with Vajrayana teachings and Vajrakilaya empowerment, available both in-person in upstate New York and via live webcast.

title: Special Mudras and Practices of Mother Tantra
teacher: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche
description_raw: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche teaches special mudras and practices of Mother Tantra in Wilga, Poland. All teachings will be available online.
ai_summary: A Bön Buddhist teaching on special mudras and practices of Mother Tantra, led by Menri Shedrup Khenpo, available online.

title: Trekchö from the Namkha Trulzod (The Miraculous Treasury of Space)
teacher: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche
description_raw: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche teaches Trekchö from the Namkha Trulzod in Poznań, Poland. All teachings will be available online.
ai_summary: A Bön Buddhist teaching on Trekchö practice from the Namkha Trulzod, led by Menri Shedrup Khenpo, available online.

title: Thögal Practice from the Ying Rig Zod (Treasury of the Expanse of Awareness)
teacher: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche
description_raw: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche teaches Thögal practice from the Ying Rig Zod in Berlin, Germany. All teachings will be available online.
ai_summary: A Bön Buddhist teaching on Thögal practice from the Ying Rig Zod, led by Menri Shedrup Khenpo, available online.

title: Profound Meditation Stages from A-tri Teachings
teacher: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche
description_raw: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche teaches profound meditation stages from A-tri teachings in Vienna, Austria. All teachings will be available online.
ai_summary: A Bön Buddhist teaching on profound meditation stages from A-tri teachings, led by Menri Shedrup Khenpo, available online.

title: Teachings with Shechen Rabjam Rinpoche
description_raw: Teachings with Shechen Rabjam Rinpoche at Lerab Ling, France, September 9-13, 2026. Teachings on guru yoga visualization and Heart Advice poetry, plus blessing empowerments including Guru Rinpoche, Orgyen Menla, Green Tara, and long-life blessing.
ai_summary: A multi-day intensive teaching and blessing empowerment event with Tibetan Buddhist teacher Shechen Rabjam Rinpoche at Lerab Ling monastery in France.

title: Dakini Tummo — Vajrayogini & Six Yogas of Naropa
start_local_text: Friday, July 10th, at 3pm Eastern Time / 8pm UK time
description_raw: Gosia is offering an ongoing series of Tummo classes with emphasis on embodied and intuitive approach to Highest Yoga Tantra, beginning Friday, July 10th at 3pm ET / 8pm UK time, gathering weekly for guided practice and Q&A. Focus includes Vajrayogini Generation Stage and Six Yogas of Naropa Completion Stage practices.
ai_summary: A weekly online Vajrayana Tantra practice group led by Gosia, focused on Tummo practices and Highest Yoga Tantra, welcoming especially women practitioners, held live via Circle.so with recordings available.

title: Dudjom Rinpoche Ngön-dro Lung and Commentary
description_raw: Lung (oral transmission) and tri (commentary) for Dudjom Rinpoche's short ngön-dro (preliminary practices), a sadhana composed for busy modern practitioners.
ai_summary: A Zoom transmission of a concise Tibetan Buddhist preliminary practice (ngön-dro) with 90-minute teaching and commentary for serious practitioners ready to commit to a one-year practice samaya.

title: Tummo Practice Preliminaries (Weekends 1 & 2)
description_raw: Four-day continuation of preliminaries for Tummo practice (started in 2025), divided into two weekends. Preparation retreat for basic level of Tummo practice.
ai_summary: A two-weekend Zoom teaching on Tibetan Bön Tummo yogic practice (preliminary level) with Geshe Choekhortshang Rinpoche, designed to prepare students for advanced Tummo training in 2027.

title: Lung Jong Pranayama
description_raw: Lung Jong Pranayama with Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche on Sunday, July 12, 2026, 9:00 am – 10:30 am CET. A complete yoga package combining movements, breathing, stretching, and meditation from Tibetan Nam Chö yoga traditions.
ai_summary: A monthly online Tibetan yoga and meditation class teaching breathing, stretching, and movement practices to harmonize body and mind, open to everyone with no prior experience needed.

title: Lung Jong Pranayama
description_raw: Lung Jong Pranayama with Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche on Sunday, August 16, 2026, 9:00 am – 10:30 am CET. A complete yoga package combining movements, breathing, stretching, and meditation from Tibetan Nam Chö yoga traditions.
ai_summary: A monthly online Tibetan yoga and meditation class teaching breathing, stretching, and movement practices to harmonize body and mind, open to everyone with no prior experience needed.

title: Lung Jong Pranayama
description_raw: Lung Jong Pranayama with Dolpo Tulku Rinpoche on Sunday, December 13, 2026, 9:00 am – 10:30 am CET. A complete yoga package combining movements, breathing, stretching, and meditation from Tibetan Nam Chö yoga traditions.
ai_summary: A monthly online Tibetan yoga and meditation class teaching breathing, stretching, and movement practices to harmonize body and mind, open to everyone with no prior experience needed.

title: Experiential Transmission of Zhang Zhung
description_raw: Zhang Zhung Nyen Gyud is the orally transmitted Dzogchen lineage of Zhang Zhung, belonging to the highest category of Dzogchen teachings — an extremely rare unbroken lineage from its origin to the present day. Taught by Khenchen Tenpa Yungdrung Rinpoche, August 21–26, 2026.
ai_summary: A six-day intensive Dzogchen transmission lineage teaching from the Bön tradition, led by Khenchen Tenpa Yungdrung Rinpoche.

title: Teachings on Heart Sutra by Kyabjé Khen Rinpoche Tashi Palden
description_raw: Teachings by Kyabjé Khen Rinpoche Tashi Palden on Heart Sutra, hosted by Rangjung Yeshe Gomde Pyrénées onsite and online, 25th July to 3rd August 2026 at 11am CET.
ai_summary: A multi-day teaching program on the Heart Sutra by an esteemed Tibetan Buddhist teacher, available both in person and online.

title: Kalachakra initiation with teachings on Three Principal Aspects of the Path and Lojong
description_raw: Kalachakra initiation with teachings on the Three Principal Aspects of the Path and Lojong, days 1–2 of His Eminence Jhado Rinpoche's five-day UK teaching tour in London, September 2026. Registration opens 1 July.
ai_summary: A two-day Tibetan Buddhist Kalachakra initiation and teachings on foundational practices with His Eminence Jhado Rinpoche in London.

title: Lama Tsongkhapa and Medicine Buddha jenangs with commentary on Lama Chöpa
description_raw: Lama Tsongkhapa and Medicine Buddha jenangs with commentary on the Lama Chöpa (Guru Puja), days 4–5 of His Eminence Jhado Rinpoche's five-day UK teaching tour in London, September 2026.
ai_summary: A two-day Tibetan Buddhist teaching on Lama Tsongkhapa and Medicine Buddha practices with commentary on the Guru Puja with His Eminence Jhado Rinpoche in London.

title: Dakini Tummo Classes — Vajrayogini Generation & Completion Stage
start_local_text: Friday, July 10th, at 3pm Eastern Time / 8pm UK time
description_raw: Ongoing series of Tummo classes with emphasis on embodied and intuitive approach to Highest Yoga Tantra, beginning July 10th at 3pm ET / 8pm UK time, weekly. Sessions can be attended live or accessed through recordings.
ai_summary: Weekly guided Vajrayana Tummo practice sessions focusing on Vajrayogini Generation Stage and Six Yogas of Naropa Completion Stage practices, led by Gosia, available live or via recording in an online community space.

title: Lung and Tri on Dudjom Rinpoche's Short Ngön-Dro
description_raw: Oral transmission (lung) and commentary (tri) for Dudjom Rinpoche's very short ngön-dro practice, given on the holy day of Chö-kor Düchen. Duration 90 minutes. Prerequisite: commitment to complete 111,111 recitations of each of five accumulations within one year.
ai_summary: A Zoom teaching on Dudjom Rinpoche's short foundational practice (ngön-dro) designed for busy modern practitioners, led by Lama Pema Chophel who has practiced it for 56 years.
